title: Figma learning lab: upskill on skills and agentic workflows
speakers: Laura Fehre (Designer Advocate, Figma ), Manish Kumar (Developer Advocate, Figma)
key_points: Introduces skills as the mechanism by which AI agents learn a domain, encoding things like research frameworks, handoff standards, and definitions of done so each session starts informed rather than from scratch.
Goes beyond the basics to cover the full lifecycle of skills: how to design, author, and deploy them so agents become measurably faster and more precise for the specific work at hand.
Hands-on and applied: attendees leave with an actual skill they helped build during the session, not just a framework or template to finish on their own later.
Pairs the learning session with informal follow-up time with the Figma team in the Learning Lab Lounge.
